description: Performance monitoring preparation (Application Insights) - analytics wrapper with no-op fallback when NEXT_PUBLIC_APPINSIGHTS_KEY is not set, plus PWA support with manifest.json, service worker, and offline page
steps: Create frontend/lib/analytics.ts with: (1) an Analytics class/object with methods trackPageView(pageName: string), trackEvent(eventName: string, properties?: Record<string,string>), trackError(error: Error, context?: string), (2) if process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APPINSIGHTS_KEY is set, log to console with '[Analytics]' prefix (placeholder for real App Insights SDK), (3) if not set, all methods are no-ops, (4) Export a singleton instance
Add analytics.trackPageView() call in frontend/app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx using a client component wrapper or useEffect
Add analytics.trackEvent('report_exported', {reportType}) in frontend/app/(dashboard)/reports/page.tsx handleDownloadPDF function
Add analytics.trackEvent('theme_toggled', {newTheme}) in frontend/lib/theme-context.tsx toggle function
Create frontend/public/ directory if it does not exist

Create frontend/public/manifest.json with: name 'GeoUMKM Intelligence', short_name 'GeoUMKM', start_url '/overview', display 'standalone', theme_color '#6366f1' (primary color), background_color '#0f172a' (dark background), icons array referencing /icon.svg with sizes 'any' and type 'image/svg+xml'

Create frontend/public/sw.js - a minimal service worker: on install event cache the app shell URLs ('/overview', '/credit-scoring', '/portfolio-analytics', '/location-intelligence', '/umkm', '/clustering', '/policy-simulation', '/reports', '/settings', '/offline'), on fetch use cache-first for same-origin non-API requests and network-first for API calls (URLs containing '/api/'), on fetch failure for navigation requests serve '/offline' from cache

Create frontend/app/offline/page.tsx - a simple static offline fallback page with a centered message saying the app is offline and suggesting to check internet connection, styled with the app's dark theme CSS variables

Update frontend/app/layout.tsx to add: (1) <link rel='manifest' href='/manifest.json' /> in head, (2) meta tags for PWA (theme-color, apple-mobile-web-app-capable, apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style, apple-mobile-web-app-title), (3) a script that registers the service worker only in production (check typeof window !== 'undefined' && 'serviceWorker' in navigator && process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production')

Update docs/MANUAL_SETUP_NOTES.md to add new sections: (K) Application Insights Setup with steps to create resource, get key, set NEXT_PUBLIC_APPINSIGHTS_KEY env var; (L) PWA Support explaining the manifest and service worker behavior
acceptance_criteria: frontend/lib/analytics.ts exports trackPageView, trackEvent, trackError functions
Analytics calls are no-ops when NEXT_PUBLIC_APPINSIGHTS_KEY is not set (no errors in console)
manifest.json is valid and accessible at /manifest.json in build output
Service worker sw.js is in the public directory and will be served at /sw.js
Offline page renders a user-friendly message
Service worker registration only happens in production (not during dev)
pnpm build succeeds with no errors (offline page generates as static route)
pnpm test:ci still passes all existing tests
